title: 2 dead, 1 critical after eating toxic muffins
bodyText:
GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Two friends from Graaff-Reinet died yesterday after allegedly consuming toxic muffins at one of their homes in uMasizakhe. It is believed that the muffins were given to them by another friend.


> It is reported that one of the victims died yesterday afternoon shortly after eating the muffin, before he could be taken to hospital.


The second victim was rushed to the Midland Hospital but died in the early hours of the morning due to organ failure, suspected to be caused by the poison.

A third friend was also rushed to Midland Hospital where he remains in a critical condition.

The poisoning occurred at one of the victims' homes in uMasizakhe, Graaff-Reinet where the other friends were visiting.

Read more on www.graaffreinetadvertiser.com

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
